release.notes:
Indie exclusive. Limited Edition Ice Blue Vinyl.

Sold at independent record stores globally on July 8 at pre-release listening events. Giveaways at these events included stickers, stamp sheets & a "safety card" (see images).

Tracks are listed sequentially on release.
